headline: C.H. Robinson Earnings Preview: What to Expect
summary: C.H. Robinson is entering earnings with strong momentum as Wall Street watches whether it can keep exceeding expectations.

headline: The Questions That Defined FDX's Earnings Call
summary: FedEx is guiding for a major profit acceleration, but on its latest earnings call, analysts pressed hard on whether the growth is real or just a story of well-timed costs.
